name: The Smuggler's Delivery Drone
description: Force the delivery drone to drop its cargo by spoofing an underwater state.

flaws.name: Spoof Altimeter
flaws.flavor_text: Overwrite altimeter pressure readings to convince the drone's navigation computer that it is deep underwater.

flaws.name: Deploy Flotation Bags
flaws.flavor_text: With the altimeter reading underwater, trigger the flotation bag deployment. They expand, blocking the solar panels and forcing an emergency cargo drop.
